fabrication_route: vehicle-bracket-controlled mould or cast Toyota-style progressive stop with new steel saddle/backing plate; do not copy decayed rubber or cut a block
base_control: Measure bracket landing BL x BW on the vehicle; finished steel/rubber base clears bracket edges by 0.5-1.0 mm
fastener_control: Measure bolt/stud pitch P and hole/thread D from the vehicle bracket; Toyota-style two-ear saddle holes +/-0.5; clearance hole +0.5/-0.0
contact_face_control: Centre flat rectangular strike face on axle strike pad within +/-5 mm; tapered/radiused progressive body wider at saddle than at strike face; no sharp cuboid
material: NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber bonded or captive to new deburred coated steel saddle
tolerance: height 70 +/-1; base +/-0.5 after vehicle release; saddle/plate must not bend in 50 percent compression test
first_article_acceptance: Seats flat; bolts pass by hand; contacts before shock/tyre/spring/brake-hose hard limit; 50 percent compression test with >=90 percent height recovery after 30 min; saddle/rubber bond or captive joint stays intact
notes: External references define long-stop height and application. Use reference image/NOS sample for Toyota-style tapered rubber plus winged steel saddle; vehicle bracket and strike pad define mould footprint and contact offset.

fabrication_route: vehicle-bracket-controlled mould or cast Toyota-style short right-front progressive stop with new steel saddle/backing plate; do not copy decayed rubber or use long-stop height
base_control: Measure right-front bracket landing BL x BW on the vehicle; finished steel/rubber base clears bracket edges by 0.5-1.0 mm
fastener_control: Measure right-front bolt/stud pitch P and hole/thread D from the vehicle bracket; Toyota-style two-ear saddle holes +/-0.5; clearance hole +0.5/-0.0
contact_face_control: Centre flat rectangular strike face on right-front axle strike pad within +/-5 mm; keep the shorter tapered right-front geometry; no square block
material: NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber bonded or captive to new deburred coated steel saddle
tolerance: height 60 +/-1; base +/-0.5 after vehicle release; do not accept 70 mm aftermarket height here; saddle/plate must not bend in 50 percent compression test
first_article_acceptance: Seats flat; bolts pass by hand; contacts before shock/tyre/spring/brake-hose hard limit; 50 percent compression test with >=90 percent height recovery after 30 min; saddle/rubber bond or captive joint stays intact
notes: ToJo warns some aftermarket 48304-60020 stops are wrongly made at the 70 mm long-stop height; reject or trim only by vehicle full-bump release.

fabrication_route: vehicle-bracket-controlled mould or cast Toyota-style progressive matched rear pair with new steel saddles/backing plates; do not copy decayed rubber or cut blocks
base_control: Measure each rear bracket landing BL x BW on the vehicle; finished steel/rubber bases clear bracket edges by 0.5-1.0 mm
fastener_control: Measure rear bolt/stud pitch P and hole/thread D from the vehicle brackets; Toyota-style two-ear saddle holes +/-0.5; clearance hole +0.5/-0.0
contact_face_control: Centre each flat rectangular strike face on rear axle strike pad within +/-5 mm; matched tapered/radiused left/right profile
material: NR/SBR automotive bump-stop rubber bonded or captive to new deburred coated steel saddles
tolerance: height 70 +/-1; rear pair free height match <=1; hardness spread <=5 Shore A; saddles/plates must not bend in 50 percent compression test
first_article_acceptance: Both rear stops seat flat; bolts pass by hand; matched pair contacts before shock/tyre/spring/brake-hose hard limit; 50 percent compression test with >=90 percent height recovery after 30 min; saddle/rubber bond or captive joint stays intact
notes: Use as matched rear pair after final ride height and axle travel checks; no universal, unmatched, or simple cut rear stops.
